name: tapagents
description: TapAgents marketplace — opinionated AI product team for Claude Code. One curated plugin, not a sprawl of forty.

plugins.name: tapagents
plugins.description: The full TapAgents framework — 18 agents, 17 commands, 30 protocols, stack-aware templates, eleven instrumented enforcement + telemetry hooks (every hook fire / block / classification / misfire lands in events.jsonl; v0.15.0 adds auto-registration of cross-cutting sessions; v0.21.0 adds the sync-discipline gate that enforces framework adoptions through the dedicated `sync-tapagents` branch), and an internal→public sync flow keeping the framework's two trees in lockstep. Installs a complete AI product team in your repo. v0.21.0 codifies the sync-tapagents branch discipline: framework version bumps in downstream consumers (e.g., agent-dashboard) flow through the dedicated branch, isolating adoption commits from rider commits.
